title: Bond to be cancelled in absence of opposition
doc_html:
§1883.  Bond to be cancelled in absence of opposition

Should there be no opposition or should it be not well founded, the judge shall order the cancellation and annullment as aforesaid.  Otherwise the application shall be denied.
doc_text:
§1883.  Bond to be cancelled in absence of opposition
Should there be no opposition or should it be not well founded, the judge shall order the cancellation and annullment as aforesaid.  Otherwise the application shall be denied.
